# Workspace Setup Checklist

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Clarify project requirements.
- [x] Scaffold the project.
- [x] Customize the project.
- [x] Install required extensions: none required.
- [x] Compile/validate project: lint and test workflow included.
- [x] Create and run task: skipped (no build task required for script repo).
- [x] Launch the project: not applicable.
- [x] Ensure documentation is complete.

## Notes

- Repository is focused on Azure Local and Hyper-V operational scripts.
- Scripts are organized by domain under `scripts/`.
- CI runs linting and tests on pull requests.
